package rulecoverage

func PositiveSaveForSingleColumnChange() string {
    ruleID := "save_for_single_column_change"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM Save used for a single-column update instead of a targeted Update call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
